forms.name: Mandatory Checklist — Formal Admin Testate (Broward)

fields.name: hearing_exparte
fields.label: Pursuing on ex-parte, motion, or special set calendar

fields.name: hearing_no_hearing
fields.label: Submitted to Judge without a hearing

fields.name: cl_criminal_history
fields.label: Affidavit Regarding Criminal History was filed

fields.name: cl_residence
fields.label: Death cert reflects Broward residence (or property situs in Petition)

fields.name: cl_petition_verified
fields.label: Petition is verified, signed by Petitioner and attorney

fields.name: cl_interest_address
fields.label: Petitioner's interest and address are in the Petition

fields.name: cl_will_filed
fields.label: Will/codicil was e-filed and original deposited with Clerk

fields.name: cl_lost_will
fields.label: OR: Petition to Establish Lost/Destroyed Will was filed

fields.name: cl_self_proved
fields.label: Will is self-proven (or oath of witness filed)

fields.name: cl_will_conformity
fields.label: OR: Non-FL resident — will conformity affidavit filed

fields.name: cl_petitioner_qualified
fields.label: Petitioner is not a felon and is FL resident (or related if non-FL)

fields.name: cl_assets
fields.label: Assets and approximate values listed in Petition

fields.name: cl_preference
fields.label: PR has preference of appointment (renunciations filed if needed)

fields.name: cl_oath_filed
fields.label: Oath of PR and designation of resident agent filed

fields.name: cl_order_filed
fields.label: Proposed order filed (4+ lines of text + case no. on sig page)

fields.name: cl_letters_filed
fields.label: Proposed letters filed (4+ lines of text + case no. on sig page)

fields.name: cl_no_trust
fields.label: A trust is NOT a beneficiary of the decedent

fields.name: cl_trust_beneficiary
fields.label: OR: Trust is a beneficiary — disclosure of trust beneficiaries filed

forms.name: Mandatory Checklist — Formal Admin Intestate (Broward)

fields.name: hearing_exparte
fields.label: Pursuing on ex-parte, motion, or special set calendar

fields.name: hearing_no_hearing
fields.label: Submitted to Judge without a hearing

fields.name: cl_criminal_history
fields.label: Affidavit Concerning Criminal History was filed

fields.name: cl_petition_signed_interested
fields.label: Petition is signed by the interested person(s)

fields.name: cl_petition_signed_attorney
fields.label: Petition is signed by an attorney of record

fields.name: cl_petitioner_relationship
fields.label: Petition includes Petitioner's relationship and residence

fields.name: cl_petitioner_qualified
fields.label: Petitioner is not a felon and is FL resident (or related if non-FL)

fields.name: cl_beneficiaries
fields.label: Correct beneficiaries listed with minor birthdates

fields.name: cl_pr_intestate_preference
fields.label: PR has preference of appointment in intestate administration

fields.name: cl_assets
fields.label: Assets and approximate values listed in Petition

fields.name: cl_oath_filed
fields.label: Oath of PR and designation of resident agent filed

fields.name: cl_order_filed
fields.label: Proposed order appointing PR filed (with space for bond)

fields.name: cl_order_sig_page
fields.label: Order signature page has 4+ lines and case number

fields.name: cl_letters_filed
fields.label: Proposed letters of administration filed (4+ lines on sig page)

forms.name: Mandatory Checklist — Summary Admin Testate (Broward)

fields.name: hearing_exparte
fields.label: Pursuing on ex-parte, motion, or special set calendar

fields.name: hearing_no_hearing
fields.label: Submitted to Judge without a hearing

fields.name: scl_medical_bills
fields.label: Proof of payment of medical bills (last 60 days of last illness)

fields.name: scl_no_medical
fields.label: OR: No such medical expenses — stated in Petition

fields.name: scl_funeral_expenses
fields.label: Proof of payment of reasonable funeral expenses

fields.name: scl_beneficiary_info
fields.label: Petition includes spouse, beneficiary names/addresses/relationships, minor birthdates

fields.name: scl_domiciliary_proceedings
fields.label: Petition includes statement re: domiciliary/principal proceedings from other state/country

fields.name: scl_summary_eligible
fields.label: Petition demonstrates summary eligibility (died 2+ yrs ago or estate < $75K less exempt property)

fields.name: scl_petitioner_qualified
fields.label: Petitioner is a beneficiary or person nominated as PR in will

fields.name: scl_will_no_admin
fields.label: Petition states will does not direct ch.733 administration

fields.name: scl_assets_described
fields.label: Assets specifically described with values (institution, account nos., legal descriptions)

fields.name: scl_creditor_search
fields.label: Petition states diligent search for creditors conducted + penalty acknowledged

fields.name: scl_no_claims
fields.label: No claims filed against the estate

fields.name: scl_claims_insufficient
fields.label: OR: Insufficient assets + formal notice served on creditors

fields.name: scl_formal_notice
fields.label: All beneficiaries received formal notice of petition + proposed distribution

fields.name: scl_consents_filed
fields.label: OR: Consents from all beneficiaries filed

fields.name: scl_distribution_correct
fields.label: Proposed order includes correct distribution per will

fields.name: scl_will_admitted
fields.label: Proposed order admitting will to probate was filed

fields.name: scl_order_sig_page
fields.label: Signature page has 4+ lines and case number

fields.name: scl_no_trust
fields.label: A trust is NOT a beneficiary of the decedent

fields.name: scl_trust_beneficiary
fields.label: OR: Trust IS a beneficiary of the will

fields.name: scl_trustee_is_petitioner
fields.label: Every trustee is also a Petitioner + disclosure filed + qualified beneficiaries served

fields.name: scl_trustee_not_petitioner
fields.label: OR: At least one trustee is not a Petitioner

fields.name: scl_homestead_filed
fields.label: Claiming homestead — Petition for Homestead filed

forms.name: Mandatory Checklist — Summary Admin Intestate (Broward)

fields.name: hearing_exparte
fields.label: Pursuing on ex-parte, motion, or special set calendar

fields.name: hearing_no_hearing
fields.label: Submitted to Judge without a hearing

fields.name: scl_medical_bills
fields.label: Proof of payment of medical bills (last 60 days of last illness)

fields.name: scl_no_medical
fields.label: OR: No such medical expenses — stated in Petition

fields.name: scl_funeral_expenses
fields.label: Proof of payment of reasonable funeral expenses

fields.name: scl_domiciliary_proceedings
fields.label: Petition includes statement re: domiciliary/principal proceedings from other state/country

fields.name: scl_summary_eligible
fields.label: Petition demonstrates summary eligibility (died 2+ yrs ago or estate < $75K less exempt property)

fields.name: scl_petitioner_is_beneficiary
fields.label: Petitioner is a beneficiary of the estate

fields.name: scl_beneficiary_info_intestate
fields.label: Petition includes spouse, beneficiary names/addresses/relationships, minor birthdates

fields.name: scl_no_wills
fields.label: Petitioner unaware of any unrevoked wills or codicils (after diligent search)

fields.name: scl_assets_described
fields.label: Assets specifically described with values (institution, account nos., legal descriptions)

fields.name: scl_formal_notice
fields.label: All intestate beneficiaries received formal notice of Petition + proposed distribution

fields.name: scl_consents_filed
fields.label: OR: Consents from all intestate beneficiaries filed

fields.name: scl_creditor_search
fields.label: Petition states diligent search for creditors conducted + penalty acknowledged

fields.name: scl_no_claims
fields.label: No claims filed against the estate

fields.name: scl_claims_insufficient
fields.label: OR: Insufficient assets + notice served on creditors

fields.name: scl_distribution_intestacy
fields.label: Proposed order includes correct distribution under laws governing intestacy

fields.name: scl_order_sig_page
fields.label: Signature page has 4+ lines and case number

fields.name: scl_no_real_property
fields.label: Estate does not contain real property

fields.name: scl_homestead_filed
fields.label: Claiming homestead — Petition to Determine Homestead filed

fields.label: Affiant does NOT have an interest in this estate

fields.label: Affiant IS related to the Decedent

fields.name: aoh_not_related
fields.label: Affiant is NOT related to the Decedent

fields.name: aoh_years_known
fields.label: Years affiant has known the Decedent

fields.label: 2a. Spouse (name, age, address; if deceased: name, DOD)

fields.label: 2b. Former spouse(s) (name, age, address; divorce/death details)

fields.name: aoh_children
fields.label: 3a. Children / descendants of deceased children (name, age, address)

fields.name: notary_means
fields.label: Means of appearance (check mark for physical)
